green-springs-inn.notes: Lots of collaboration posts this month
Direct booking split is very strong this month! A few collaboration posts this month, which align with slightly higher views and steady lead growth.

We received significantly more bookings through OTA. Showing a decline in the direct bookings split, there was still growth in direct booking revenue. Additionally, occupancy rates were higher this month, which is great to see.
Total views have doubled this month compared to last month! Views overall have been more stable at over 1,000 per video
Direct booking revenue is higher than last year. Overall, not a big change from views this month.
We paused the Facebook New Leads Campaign. The direct booking split is improving; however, direct bookings for this month are less than last year.
Started follower ad campaign this month
Spending $30/day for this account. Highest Direct Booking Split So Far!
We started RT ads last week of Dec at $10/day. Last year booking revenue was significantly higher. Something to keep an eye on.
Started Manychat this month! Overall solid month, direct booking split is the second highest
Steady direct booking split. Huge growth in social media views
